zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline de Héron於1225年出生在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登時，她的父親Jordan de Héron IV26歲，母親Isabel de Néville33歲。她於大約1242年與Nicholas De Hastings在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國艾可韋斯特 霍登享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Héron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline de Héron was born in 1225, in East Horndon, Essex, England, her father, Jordan de Héron IV, was 26 and her mother, Isabel de Néville, was 33. She married Nicholas De Hastings about 1242, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1300, in West Horndon, Essex, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline de Héron est née en 1225, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Jordan de Héron IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Néville, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas De Hastings environ 1242, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à West Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline de Héron 1225 in East Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jordan de Héron IV 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Néville 33. Sie hat um 1242 in England, United Kingdom Nicholas De Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 75 Jahren in West Horndon, Essex, England.

Lei sposato Nicholas De Hastings circa 1242, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel West Horndon, Essex, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline de Héronが1225年にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Jordan de Héron IVは26歳，母Isabel de Névilleは33歳であった。約1242年にイギリスイギリスでNicholas De Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスエセックスウエスト ホールンドンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline de Héron(이)가 1225년 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jordan de Héron IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Néville(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Nicholas De Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 에세스 웨스트 호른던에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline de Héron nasceu em 1225, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan de Héron IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Néville, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas De Hastings aproximadamente 1242, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ro.Kirkby Stephen, Westmoreland, England: Kirkby Stephen, Westmorland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline de Héron родилась в 1225 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Jordan de Héron IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Néville, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas De Hastings около 1242 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности вест хаурндон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Nicholas De Hastings aproximadamente 1242, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1300, en West Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
